title: ByeBye Bats 🦇
description: Instant kill bats who try to iritate you..
body:
**Small Mod Description:**
The byeBye Bats mod adds a new block/item to your Minecraft server. With this bat, you can instantly kill all bats!

**Bye bat! 👋**

![bat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b9795c63af88923f85fa6fa9ac3225757eac5da.png)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bf0c4246c43630fa7aeea3877acf15f55627c04.png)

**1 - The bat works on ticks. Every tick, it will kill every bat in the game**

**2 - The BAT will not work if the chunk is not loaded
Download ( Chunk Loaders )**

**3 - Works without redstone. Just place and ready!**

![bat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b25565d62bef3020789905680444b9a3a33a8da_0.webp)

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7813102240cc43b08bff340f376f66618e5d6259.png)
![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef84d8dc76b232f04ca5c83442ce87022cf50ddc.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#NO-SPON

**Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
